steps.t: The path across the Drekvath River can be found east of Shakal-atrâd. You should confront the raiding party of the Drekvath River.
The Drekvath River can be found east of Shakal-atrâd. You should talk to Yrsa Spearwife by the Drekvath River.
Yrsa Spearwife can be found at Shakal-atrâd. You should talk to Yrsa Spearwife at Shakal-atrâd.
Shakal-atrâd can be found in Elderslade. You should give Beorining-made spears to the dwarves at Shakal-atrâd.
Langhár can be found at Zarkul-sulûn. You should talk to Langhár.
